# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-validation
spec:
  jwks:
    # JWKS endpoint to fetch the public keys used to validate the tokens
    # Note that this should be a secure endpoint, and Istio will not verify the token signature if the JWKS is insecure.
    jwksUri: https://my-jwt-issuer.com/jwks
  issuer:
    # The expected issuer of the tokens. If not specified, Istio will accept any issuer.
    issuer: my-jwt-issuer
  rules:
  - selector:
      matchLabels:
        app: my-api
    headers:
      # Extract JWT claims from Authorization header using the 'Bearer' scheme.
      authorization:
        # The name of the header containing the JWT token, without the 'Bearer' scheme.
        name: jwt
        # The claim to extract, in this case the 'sub' (subject) claim.
        value: sub
